Dataset Factory (machine-readable index)
not_investment_advice=true
rule:no_buy_sell_target_price_recommendation
rule:preserve_data_gaps_and_unknowns

allowed_dataset_ids:
- balance_sheet
- block_trade_daily
- bond_convertible_reference
- broker_branch_reference
- business_indicator_monthly
- capital_formation_events
- cash_flow
- company_risk_events
- convertible_bond_institutional_flow
- day_trading_suspension
- disposition_securities_period
- dividends
- esg_tesg
- etf_holdings
- fund_etf_metadata
- income_statement
- insider_director_holdings
- institutional_flow
- margin_short
- market_index
- market_overview_snapshots
- monthly_revenue
- options_daily_taifex
- ownership_distribution
- securities_lending
- security_master
- stock_delisting_lifecycle
- stock_price_limit_daily
- stock_split_par_value_events
- taifex_institutional_flow
- taifex_options_settlement_price
- tax_business_registration
- technical_indicators
- total_margin_short_daily
- valuation_core_daily
- valuation_data
- warrants_reference

not_available:
# Datasets deliberately NOT offered. They are absent from allowed_dataset_ids above and must not be
# treated as available. Listed here so agents get an honest answer instead of assuming coverage.
- id=announcements_fulltext; status=metadata-only; note=公告全文不提供（版權考量）；僅提供結構化 metadata
- id=filings_fulltext; status=metadata-only; note=申報書全文不提供（版權考量）；僅提供結構化 metadata
- id=bond_yield_curve; status=roadmap; note=公債殖利率曲線尚未建置，目前無資料
- id=taifex_atm_iv; status=coverage-limited; note=表已建立但尚無資料，待上游 taifex_options 填充
- id=regime_serve; status=frozen; note=已凍結，不對外提供

answer_pages:
- url=/answers/taiwan-stock-data-api-for-ai-agents; topic=Taiwan stock data API for AI agents (台版 financialdatasets.ai); lang=zh-Hant
- url=/answers/taiwan-financial-statements-monthly-revenue-api; topic=Taiwan financial statements & monthly revenue API (MOPS-reconciled, as_of); lang=zh-Hant
- url=/compare/twmarketdata-vs-finmind-vs-tej; topic=TW Market Data vs FinMind vs TEJ — choosing a Taiwan stock data API; lang=zh-Hant
